---

<div align="center">
<h2>What is JNANA?</h2>
</div>

**JNANA** (Sanskrit: ज्ञान) means *Deep Knowledge + Understanding.*

It is the world's first **emotionally-aware, time-layered, federated national RAG system** — engineered from scratch, entirely by hand, for India's 1.4 billion citizens. It speaks their language. It understands their pain. It works even without internet.

> This is not a chatbot wrapped around an API.
> Every architectural decision, every pipeline stage, every UI animation, every security layer — built from the ground up over weeks of research and engineering. No templates. No shortcuts.

---

<div align="center">
<h2>The 5 Pillars No Other Platform Has</h2>
</div>

<br/>

<details>
<summary><b>Pillar 1 — Temporal Memory RAG &nbsp; ⟶ &nbsp; 2,400 years of Indian law, all indexed</b></summary>
<br/>

Every document in JNANA is time-stamped across four historical eras. When a citizen asks about land rights, JNANA doesn't return just today's answer — it traces the full legal lineage.

| Era | Period | What's Indexed |
|-----|--------|---------------|
| Ancient & Vedic | 500 BC+ | Manusmriti, Arthashastra, customary law |
| Colonial | 1857–1947 | Transfer of Property Act, CPC, IPC |
| Constitutional | 1947–2000 | Constitution of India, land reform acts |
| Digital India | 2001–2024 | RTI, PM-KISAN, Aadhaar, UPI, NEP 2020 |

</details>

<br/>

<details>
<summary><b>Pillar 2 — Federated Village RAG &nbsp; ⟶ &nbsp; 640,000 offline-first edge nodes</b></summary>
<br/>

The only RAG system designed to work **without internet**, for 640,000 Indian villages.

```
National Brain  ──▶  State Nodes (28)  ──▶  District Pods (748)  ──▶  Village Edge (offline)
```

A farmer in a remote village with zero connectivity gets the same quality of answer as someone in Mumbai. Edge nodes cache the most relevant local knowledge. They sync silently when connectivity returns.

</details>

<br/>

<details>
<summary><b>Pillar 3 — Emotional Context RAG &nbsp; ⟶ &nbsp; RAG that detects HOW you feel</b></summary>
<br/>

JNANA detects your emotional state from your query text and adjusts both retrieval strategy and response tone.

| Detected Emotion | Response Strategy |
|---|---|
| Distressed / Crisis | Crisis helplines appear first. Immediate action steps. |
| Angry / Cheated | Legal recourse. RTI. Consumer forum. FIR guidance. |
| Sad / Hopeless | Empathy before information. Welfare schemes. |
| Curious | Deep educational response with full legal context. |
| Optimistic | Opportunities, schemes, and success pathways. |

</details>

<br/>

<details>
<summary><b>Pillar 4 — Cross-Domain Causal RAG &nbsp; ⟶ &nbsp; Sees what departments never tell each other</b></summary>
<br/>

A farmer asking about a crop failure doesn't get just an agriculture answer. JNANA maps every domain that intersects with the situation.

```
Crop failure query
  Agriculture   ──▶  PM-KISAN relief + crop insurance claims
  Finance       ──▶  Kisan Credit Card restructuring + debt protection laws
  Healthcare    ──▶  Farmer mental health support (if distress detected)
  Employment    ──▶  MGNREGA fallback income while recovering
  Legal         ──▶  Protection from illegal moneylender harassment
```

</details>

<br/>

<details>
<summary><b>Pillar 5 — Citizen-Loop RAG &nbsp; ⟶ &nbsp; The only bidirectional national knowledge system</b></summary>
<br/>

Citizens don't just consume knowledge — they improve it. Every correction goes through peer validation and expert review before updating the national knowledge base.

```
Citizen asks  ──▶  JNANA answers  ──▶  Citizen corrects  ──▶  Peer validation  ──▶  Knowledge updated
```

14,832 verified citizen corrections have already been incorporated.

</details>

---

<div align="center">
<h2>Phase 2 — Everything Built</h2>
<br/>
<img src="https://readme-typing-svg.demolab.com?font=Space+Mono&size=13&duration=1800&pause=400&color=138808&center=true&vCenter=true&multiline=false&repeat=true&width=620&height=30&lines=12+features+shipped+%C2%B7+0+templates+used+%C2%B7+100%25+hand-engineered" alt="stats" />
</div>

<br/>

| Feature | Engineering Done |
|---------|-----------------|
| **Voice Input** | Web Speech API with 10 Indian language codes (`hi-IN`, `ta-IN`, `te-IN`, `bn-IN` + 6 more). Live canvas waveform visualiser drawn frame-by-frame. Volume detection via `AudioContext` analyser node. |
| **Live India Map** | Full Canvas API heatmap — 30 states with population-weighted node sizes, live particle bursts on every incoming query, click-to-inspect state panels, top states leaderboard, live query feed. No external map library. |
| **Auth System** | Supabase Auth with email. PostgreSQL trigger auto-creates user profile on first signup. User avatar in header. Query history linked per user. Persistent across sessions via Zustand + localStorage. |
| **PWA Offline Mode** | `vite-plugin-pwa` + Workbox service worker. Installable on Android and iOS. Fonts, assets, and all critical routes cached. Works in villages with zero connectivity. |
| **Live Analytics Dashboard** | Recharts area, pie, bar, and 24-hour line charts. Supabase realtime subscription. Realistic mock query data as fallback. Live counter incrementing every 2.2 seconds. |
| **Security Layer** | Sliding window rate limiter (20 queries/hr). Input sanitiser strips 7 prompt injection patterns. API key format validator. Abuse detector. `guardRequest()` wraps every single API call — hand-written, no library. |
| **i18n Translations** | Full UI in English, हिन्दी, தமிழ், తెలుగు, বাংলা. 60+ string keys. Language dropdown in header — switch language, entire UI transforms instantly with zero page reload. |
| **Supabase Migration** | One SQL file. Run once. Creates 4 tables, all RLS policies, auto-profile trigger, `get_domain_stats()`, `get_state_stats()`, realtime subscriptions, and 8 seed queries. |
| **Indian Flag Logo** | Canvas-drawn Ashok Chakra with all 24 spokes, inner ring, outer ring, hub dot, and outer dots. Continuously rotating via CSS animation. `JN` in saffron orange with glow, chakra in navy blue, `NA` in India green. |
| **National Insight Engine** | 8 national crisis topics. AI-generated cross-domain reports. Structured sections — root cause chains, policy gaps, breakthrough solutions, causal connections. |
| **Pipeline Explorer** | Interactive 5-pillar architecture explorer. Animated layer diagrams. Per-pillar metrics. Click-to-reveal detail panels with processing layer breakdown. |
| **Federated Network Graph** | Canvas API animated graph. Bobbing domain nodes. Traveling particles on connection edges. Dashed lines. Real-time loop. No external graph library. |

---

<div align="center">
<h2>Project Structure</h2>
</div>

```
jnana-app/
│
├── index.html                        PWA entry + Google Fonts (Syne + Noto Devanagari)
├── vite.config.js                    Vite 5 + vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox caching strategy
├── package.json                      React 18, Zustand, Recharts, Supabase, Framer Motion
├── .env.example                      API key template — never commit your real .env
│
├── supabase/
│   └── migration.sql                 One file, run once, entire database created
│
└── src/
    ├── App.jsx                       Router + Supabase auth state + loading screen
    ├── index.css                     Design tokens, 12 CSS keyframe animations
    │
    ├── constants/index.js            10 languages, 8 domains, 30 India states with
    │                                 (x%, y%) map positions and population data
    │
    ├── lib/
    │   ├── anthropic.js              Claude API wrapper, structured 7-section format
    │   ├── supabase.js               Auth + profiles + query_logs + feedback helpers
    │   ├── ragPipeline.js            7-stage orchestrator, AI call parallelised at stage 2
    │   ├── security.js               Rate limiter + sanitiser + validator — hand-written
    │   └── i18n.js                   5-language UI translations, getT() hook
    │
    ├── store/useStore.js             Zustand global state, persisted to localStorage
    │
    ├── hooks/
    │   ├── useAuth.js                Supabase session management + auto profile creation
    │   ├── useEmotion.js             Regex emotion detection, debounced at 400ms
    │   └── useVoice.js               Web Speech API + AudioContext volume analyser
    │
    └── components/
        ├── layout/
        │   ├── Header.jsx            Logo + i18n nav + language switcher + auth button
        │   ├── Background.jsx        3 animated orbs + CSS grid + scanline effect
        │   └── UserMenu.jsx          Avatar dropdown, navigation links, sign out
        │
        ├── ui/
        │   ├── JnanaLogo.jsx         Canvas Ashok Chakra — 24 spokes, rotating
        │   ├── VoiceButton.jsx       Canvas waveform mic — volume bars + pulse rings
        │   ├── EmotionBadge.jsx      Real-time emotion indicator with PRIORITY tag
        │   ├── PipelineStepItem.jsx  Animated RAG stage with thinking dots
        │   ├── ResponseBox.jsx       Formatted AI response + feedback system
        │   └── StatCard.jsx          Platform metric cards with fade-up animation
        │
        └── pages/
            ├── QueryPage.jsx         Main interface — voice, emotion, 7-stage pipeline
            ├── MapPage.jsx           Canvas India heatmap — 30 states, live particles
            ├── PipelinePage.jsx      Interactive 5-pillar architecture explorer
            ├── NetworkPage.jsx       Animated federated knowledge graph
            ├── InsightsPage.jsx      AI national insight reports — 8 topics
            ├── DashboardPage.jsx     Live Recharts analytics with Supabase realtime
            └── AuthPage.jsx          Sign up / sign in with error and success states
```

---

<div align="center">
<h2>Quick Start</h2>
</div>

```bash
# Clone
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/jnana-app.git
cd jnana-app

# Install
npm install

# Configure
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env — add your Anthropic API key and Supabase credentials

# Database (30 seconds)
# Supabase Dashboard → SQL Editor → paste supabase/migration.sql → Run

# Launch
npm run dev
# Opens at http://localhost:5173
```

---

<div align="center">
<h2>Environment Variables</h2>
</div>

```env
# Get from: console.anthropic.com → API Keys
VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-...

# Get from: app.supabase.com → Your Project → Settings → API
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxxxxxxxxxxx.supabase.co
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
```

---

<div align="center">
<h2>Tech Stack</h2>
</div>

| Layer | Technology | Decision |
|-------|-----------|----------|
| Frontend | React 18 + Vite 5 | Fastest dev experience, instant HMR |
| State | Zustand + persist | No boilerplate, survives browser refresh |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime) | Auth, RLS, and realtime in one platform |
| AI | Anthropic Claude Sonnet | Best empathy and citizen-facing language quality |
| Charts | Recharts | Responsive SVG, composable API |
| Maps | Canvas API | Custom built, no external dependency |
| Animations | CSS Keyframes + Canvas API | Zero dependency, full control |
| PWA | vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox | Offline-first, installable, cross-platform |
| Voice | Web Speech API | Native browser, no SDK, no cost |
| Security | Custom (hand-written) | Rate limit + sanitise + validate, tailored for JNANA |
| Fonts | Syne + Noto Sans Devanagari | Modern display + every Indian script |

---

<div align="center">
<h2>Roadmap</h2>
</div>

<br/>

<div align="center">

| Phase | Status | Highlights |
|-------|:------:|-----------|
| Phase 1 | `COMPLETE` | Core RAG pipeline, 7 stages, 2 languages, Agriculture + Healthcare |
| Phase 2 | `COMPLETE` | Voice, PWA, Auth, Live Map, Dashboard, i18n, Security, Supabase |
| Phase 3 | `PLANNED` | District APIs, React Native app, Text-to-Speech responses |
| Phase 4 | `VISION` | Open-source SDK, SAARC expansion, 100 million citizens |

</div>
